title: Goety Hostility
description: Adds naturally spawning hostile variants of Goety Servants.
body:
Have you ever wanted your Goety experience to be filled with even more enemies? Look no further as this mod adds hostile variants of existing servants! ![raging inferno](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffeb6caf95c8f308cdc9828db4106c0f49e43cb8_0.webp) # Current Hostile Mobs: Blackguard **Frozen Zombie** - found in snowy biomes
**Jungle Zombie** - found in jungle biomes
**Iceologer** - found in snowy biomes, found in raids
**Geomancer** - found in savannas, found in raids
**Mossy Skeleton** - found in jungle biomes
**Vanguard** - found in deserts
**Leapleaf** - found in jungle biomes
**Whisperer** - found in jungle biomes
**Vindicator Chef** - found in raids
**Mountaineer** - found in raids
**Wind Caller** - found in raids
**Squall Golem** - found in raids
**Wildfire** - Miniboss, found in the Raging Inferno Structure
![gh_banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7408d9b2d4da440285e829046eecb7368b6f4cfb_0.webp) **Requires: Goety, Patchouli, Curios API** Credits:
**Polarice3** - orginal author of Goety **crougamer.exe** - Translator (Portuguese (Brazil))  **Mojang Studios** - Minecraft Dungeons
